cold_email.subject: Application for {{role}} — {{candidate_name}}
cold_email.body:
Hi {{recruiter_name}},

I’m {{candidate_name}}, a fresher applying for the {{role}} role at {{company}}. My relevant strengths include {{skill_cluster}} and I’ve worked on {{project_highlight}}.

If helpful, I can share a tailored one-page ATS resume and project links. I’d appreciate the opportunity to interview.

Regards,
{{candidate_name}}

templates.linkedin: Hi {{recruiter_name}}, I’m {{candidate_name}}. I’m applying for the {{role}} role at {{company}}. I have project experience in {{skill_cluster}}. Could I share my resume/portfolio?
